name: Japan System Techniques Co., Ltd.
summary: Japan System Techniques Co., Ltd. engages in the software business in Japan. It operates through four segments: Software Business, Gakuen Business, System Sales Business, and Medical Big Data Business. The company offers software development services; provides business and engineering applications; and operates in medical big data business. It also offers system consultation, integration, and management and administration services; develops and sells software package products; and provides database services. Japan System Techniques Co., Ltd. was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
